Article.ArticleTitle: Enhanced recovery after Caesarean delivery. Part 1: preoperative and intraoperative considerations.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Guy's and St Thomas' NHS Foundation Trust, London, UK.
Guy's and St Thomas' NHS Foundation Trust, London, UK.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: N.D. is an editor and editorial board member of BJA Education. The other authors declare that they have no conflicts of interest.

Reference.Citation: Betran A.P., Ye J., Moller A.B., Souza J.P., Zhang J. Trends and projections of caesarean section rates: global and regional estimates. BMJ Glob Health. 2021;6
